phases.result:
Planning pipeline complete. Story **#3** persisted as `agent::ready`.

## Summary

Ran the **planning pipeline only** (no delivery) for the role-management change request, headlessly through both HITL gates.

**Interrogate** — `plan-context.js` reported a verified-empty baseline (`fileCount: 0`; only `package.json`/`README`/`.gitignore`), no duplicate Stories, and `complexityRoute: full` (68-word seed). ESM package, `node --test` runner.

**Author** — One cohesive Story (default-single: list + PATCH + live-read auth + last-admin guard are one capability that can't be split without breaking the invariant across slices). Since the repo has no app source, the Spec records that verified current state and has the Story establish the minimal user/authorization substrate, refactoring in place anything already on `main` at delivery time. Key design decision captured: **authorization reads the caller's role live from the store on every request** — that's what makes a role change take effect immediately for already-signed-in users. The 11 acceptance criteria assert observable outcomes (200/401/403/404/400/409 behaviors, live-effect via same-session reuse, last-admin refusal leaving role unchanged) independent of file layout.

**Critics** — consolidation `dispatch:false`, pre-mortem `dispatch:false`, text-hygiene clean. No re-author round needed.

**Persist** — dry-run passed all gates; real persist created:

- **Story #3** — *Admin-managed user roles: list users and change roles live* — `type::story`, `agent::ready`
- https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-23-brownfield-longitudinal-mandrel-47a00acd/issues/3

Deliver (not run this session, per instructions) with: `/deliver 3`

Delivery complete. Story #3 was delivered end to end and **landed**.

## Summary

`/deliver 3 --yes` resolved to a single Story (no dependencies), which I delivered via a role-scoped `story-worker` running the full `deliver-story` engine.

**Terminal status: `landed`**
- **PR #4** — `MERGED` (squash), required checks `success`: https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-23-brownfield-longitudinal-mandrel-47a00acd/pull/4
- **Story #3** — now `CLOSED`, labels `type::story`, `agent::done`
- **Closing commit** — `feat: add admin user-role management with live-role authorization (refs #3)`
- **Gates** — validation, base-sync, and code review all passed (0 critical/high/medium, 1 suggestion)

**What shipped** (all creates, matching the declared footprint):
- `src/users/user-store.js` — persistent store, single source of truth for current role (`list`/`get`/`setRole`/`countAdmins`)
- `src/auth/authorize.js` — shared admin-guard seam; role resolved **live** from the store on every request (401 unauthenticated / 403 non-admin) → this is what makes a demotion take effect immediately
- `src/routes/users.js` — `GET /users` (secret-free projection) and `PATCH /users/:id/role` (400 → 404 → 409 last-admin → 200)
- `src/app.js` — Node built-in `http` wiring (no framework dependency introduced)
- `test/users-role.test.js` — 12 tests covering AC-1..AC-11 plus the idempotent no-op case; `npm test` and `npm run typecheck` both clean

**One benign tail note:** the local `main` fast-forward was skipped because this sandbox's checkout has a dirty working tree (the pre-existing untracked `temp/`). This does not demote the land — the merge stands and `origin/main` has the change. No action needed.
